title: Sponsorship Opportunities - ICBAB 2026
content: Sponsorship Opportunities The conference would undoubtedly provide you with a unique opportunity to gain a prominent vision and explore business opportunities among various stakeholders in the area of Biotechnology and Life Sciences. Sponsorship Packages ICBAB 2026 welcomes sponsors under the following categories Benefits / Tier Platinum ₹1,00,000 Gold ₹75,000 Silver ₹50,000 Bronze ₹25,000 Logo on Conference Website Home Page Supply Company Branded Material (Pens, Notebooks, Stickers) High Tea & Lunch with Keynote Speakers & Executive Team — Exhibit Space — Technical Presentation Slot 10 min slot 10 min slot — — Logo on Banners All Types Main Backdrop & Standee Normal Banners Normal Banners Logo on Badges All Types Delegates & Volunteers Delegates & Volunteers Organizing Committee Company Details in Souvenir Book Full Page Full Page Half-Page Half-Page Complimentary Tickets 4 Delegates 2 Delegates 1 Delegate — Advertisement in the Souvenir Book Promote your brand directly in our conference souvenir book. Full Page ₹10,000/- Half Page ₹5,000/- Requirement: Vendor should provide a ready-to-use matter. Become a Sponsor Today The interested parties are invited to fill in the Sponsorship/Donation Form can be provided upon request by contacting the Convener. Contact Convener
